input: Mask anh tu walk_mask cua CMD_MAP, to mau theo mask_color_convention.json
rule: Vung mau FREE/SLOPE -> ve duong di, mat dat thoang.
Vung BLOCK -> ve vat can (tuong/da/cay lon).
O PORTAL -> giu thoang, de nhin thay loi ra/vao.
O ANCHOR -> giu trong, KHONG ve vat che (cho NPC dung).
Vung SPAWN -> giu thoang, du cho quai xuat hien.
forbidden: KHONG ve de len o portal/anchor. KHONG lam vung spawn bi chan.
